chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3095 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.14072/2018 3. For hearing of main case 17.12.2024 Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that this petition is covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Premier Systems (Pvt.) Ltd. and others vs. Federation of Pakistan (2018 PTD 861), therefore, this petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
